messages.author: Kevin_K
messages.text: Hi all, new post for those in the American SW. We are using 910.525MHz like some of the other US areas.
messages.content_html: Hi all, new post for those in the American SW. We are using 910.525MHz like some of the other US areas.

messages.author: Kevin_K
messages.text: DanaHillsMC is online with an advert (nodeinfo in MT terms) interval of 60 minutes.
messages.content_html: DanaHillsMC is online with an advert (nodeinfo in MT terms) interval of 60 minutes.

messages.author: Kevin_K
messages.text: I have 2 up, but just have silence too. I'll update firmware in a few weeks and post my map then
messages.content_html: I have 2 up, but just have silence too. I'll update firmware in a few weeks and post my map then

messages.author: Kevin_K
messages.text: You may not want to put too much effort into it until I can update my repeaters with new firmware with the fixed SX1262 receive gain. Folsom Ridge in San Clemente is the location of the other repeater node. Should provide good coverage in South OC. You're on your own over the foothills for now.
messages.content_html: You may not want to put too much effort into it until I can update my repeaters with new firmware with the fixed SX1262 receive gain. Folsom Ridge in San Clemente is the location of the other repeater node. Should provide good coverage in South OC. You're on your own over the foothills for now.

messages.author: Giglio (San Diego)
messages.text: Hi all, I'm up in Oceanside, could I get what the settings are for this area? I've been playing with MT for a good while and want to change one of my fixed Station G2's over to a repeater to help with the cause. Thanks!
messages.content_html: Hi all, I'm up in Oceanside, could I get what the settings are for this area? I've been playing with MT for a good while and want to change one of my fixed Station G2's over to a repeater to help with the cause. Thanks!

messages.author: Giglio (San Diego)
messages.text: I found your post over on the MT SOCAL discord and used these settings. except I upped the power for the G2 while staying within legal limits. I made my unit a room server and enabled repeat. (edited)
messages.content_html: I found your post over on the MT SOCAL discord and used these settings. except I upped the power for the G2 while staying within legal limits. I made my unit a room server and enabled repeat. (edited)

messages.author: Kevin_K
messages.text: Yep, that's what Im using, but I'm kinda tucked in some hills so I may not get out to you
messages.content_html: Yep, that's what Im using, but I'm kinda tucked in some hills so I may not get out to you

messages.author: Giglio (San Diego)
messages.text: Likewise, I have a hill to the north of me that foils all attempts to get there directly.
messages.content_html: Likewise, I have a hill to the north of me that foils all attempts to get there directly.
